articles.title: Despite ‘misgivings,’ judge approves Elon Musk’s $1.5 million SEC settlement
articles.description: The saga of Musk's tussle with the SEC over how he disclosed his growing stake in Twitter (now called X) has come to an end.

articles.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
articles.description: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

articles.title: Feds demand autonomous vehicle companies stop interfering with first responders
articles.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said emergency scenes are not "edge cases."

articles.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
articles.description: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

articles.title: With EU backing, QuantumDiamonds aims to speed up chip manufacturing
articles.description: Like its U.S. counterpart, the European Chips Act aims to foster the semiconductor industry — in part thanks to state subsidies. One of the beneficiaries is QuantumDiamonds, a German startup that applies a novel approach to inspecting chips.

articles.title: Autonomous drone delivery startup Manna plots major US expansion
articles.description: Manna is launching a U.S. operations and manufacturing facility in Tulsa, Oklahoma, that will eventually employ 1,000 people.

articles.title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
articles.description: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

articles.title: ‘Slow-cial’ app Roost forces you to slow down to the speed of a carrier pigeon
articles.description: This developer didn't expect his side project to grow to 300,000 users, but people love Roost because it's an alternative to an always-on, fast-paced online culture.

articles.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
articles.description: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

articles.title: Elon Musk says X will send DMs when posts you’ve engaged with are corrected
articles.description: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking system often arrives too late to curb misinformation.

articles.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
articles.description: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

articles.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
articles.description: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a […]

articles.title: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
articles.description: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.

articles.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
articles.description: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

articles.title: Crypto VC firm Paradigm raises $1.2B to invest in ‘technical frontier’ startups
articles.description: For Paradigm, the technical frontier will stretch beyond its cryptocurrency investment roots. This fund is expected to expand its investment focus to include robotics and AI.

articles.title: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
articles.description: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.

articles.title: Another massive data breach exposed millions of driver’s license numbers
articles.description: The cyberattack targeting a U.S. insurance giant is the largest known breach of driver's license numbers so far in 2026.

articles.title: These AI startups are growing revenue at faster and faster rates
articles.description: There are a lot of fast-growing AI startups, but some are growing even faster, they say.

articles.title: Solo GP Ashley Smith announces second $25M fund to back startups in AI, security and more
articles.description: Vermilion Cliffs Ventures announced Wednesday the close of a $25 million Fund II.

articles.title: Apple to produce Made in America wireless chips with Broadcom
articles.description: Apple has signed a $30 billion+ multiyear deal with Broadcom to design and produce more than 15 billion U.S.-made custom wireless connectivity chips for Apple products.

articles.title: "We cannot choose to become idiots": The AI cheating scandal roiling Brown University
articles.description: AI cheating leads to "a failed society," professor says.

articles.title: Lawsuit: Man used Grok to make 7K sex images of stepdaughter, then shot himself
articles.description: More young girls sue X over Grok CSAM; X accused of shielding child predators.

articles.title: Judge rejects Kalshi attempt to override New York state gambling laws
articles.description: Kalshi tried to ignore gambling laws on its prediction market, NY governor says.

articles.title: Google pays $250K for Linux vulnerability allowing guest VM escapes
articles.description: Both vulnerabilities allow untrusted users to gain root privileges.

articles.title: Aussie gov't tells volunteers to throw out thousands of functioning test routers
articles.description: But the devices could "easily be reflashed."

articles.title: TikTok users don't have as much agency over their FYPs as they think
articles.description: The "not interested" feature is your friend, but users must intentionally and constantly curate their FYPs

articles.title: US seeks cheaper hunter-killer drones after Iran destroys $1B worth of Reapers
articles.description: US military drone losses in Iran war spur Pentagon call for cheap replacements.

articles.title: Miami-based City Labs achieves a first for commercial nuclear power in space
articles.description: "The BOHR mission serves as a pathfinder for future nuclear-powered spacecraft."

articles.title: Google updates Android Bench with new LLMs, but Gemini still lags behind
articles.description: Android Bench is evolving, and developers can help guide that process.

articles.title: Two teens learn the hard way not to do toy gun drive-bys from a Waymo
articles.description: The robotaxi stopped, called 911, and waited for the San Mateo Police to show up.

articles.title: Ocean rift zone saw spreading happen in a sudden burst
articles.description: The crust expands at mid-ocean rifts. But how?

articles.title: US rare earths flow to Asia as domestic demand is slow to emerge
articles.description: Miners backed by Trump admin sell to Japan, South Korea despite push to develop domestic supply chain.

articles.title: Blue Origin, for the first time, is expected to raise private capital
articles.description: The company is raising $10 billion, leading to a valuation of $130 billion.

articles.title: Hackers can use 9 of the most popular AI tools to assemble massive botnets
articles.description: "HalluSquatting" weaponizes LLMs' inability to say "I don't know."

articles.title: Michigan sees explosive outbreak of diarrheal parasite with over 700 cases
articles.description: Cases have risen quickly as officials are working to identify a common source.

articles.title: Data centers’ energy demand threatens Trump’s “Made in America” plan
articles.description: Squeeze on Rust Belt electricity bills threatens Trump’s manufacturing plan.

articles.title: Surprisingly large number of people may have marker for tick-linked meat allergy
articles.description: There's still a slew of questions about why some people develop alpha-gal syndrome.

articles.title: SCOTUS lets Texas enforce app store law that Big Tech calls "censorship regime"
articles.description: Texas win at 5th Circuit left in place as attempts to overturn age law continue.

articles.title: Bethesda, id Software reportedly hit hard by Microsoft layoffs
articles.description: As much as 50 percent of some teams affected by reductions, and more could be coming.

articles.title: Google's Pixel 11 launch event is set for August 12, with possible price increases
articles.description: Google's new phones could feature glowing LEDs and higher price tags.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI与监管动态**：法官批准马斯克支付150万美元SEC和解金；联邦政府要求自动驾驶公司停止干扰急救人员；Meta的AI眼镜策略引发隐私担忧。
2. **企业融资与估值**：AI初创公司Lovable估值或翻倍至132亿美元；加密风投Paradigm募资12亿美元投资前沿技术；量子钻石公司获欧盟支持加速芯片制造。
3. **AI模型与应用**：SpaceXAI发布Grok 4.5称达“Opus级”；OpenAI推出更自然的实时对话语音模型；谷歌推出深度伪造检测系统及“视频混剪”AI工具。
4. **新兴科技与产品**：无人机配送公司Manna计划大举扩张美国市场；创业公司称机器人技术将迎来“ChatGPT时刻”；慢社交App“Roost”强制用户放慢节奏。
5. **平台功能更新**：马斯克称X平台将通知用户查看已互动帖子的更正信息；视频游戏数据被认为比互联网更适合训练AI模型。

今日最值得关注的发展是：AI监管与商业化的矛盾进一步激化，同时生成式AI在语音、视频和机器人领域的应用加速落地。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **Hugging Face 多项更新**：包括推出面向智能体的数据方案、vLLM原生速度的Transformers建模后端、一键部署至Amazon SageMaker Studio、在Foundry托管计算上运行模型、与SkyPilot合作实现零出站存储跨云运行AI工作负载，以及LeRobot v0.6.0版本发布（聚焦想象、评估与改进）、数据战略第四部分、Kernels重大更新等。

2. **Google Gemini API扩展**：新增后台任务、远程MCP等能力，进一步强化托管智能体功能。

3. **OpenAI多领域进展**：发布政府与国家安全合作策略、代码评估中信号与噪音分离方法、面向K-12教师的AI技能培训、推出GPT-Live产品，并展示与澳大利亚支付公司（Australian Payments Plus）及日本三菱日联金融集团（MUFG）的深度合作案例。

4. **企业AI转型加速**：MUFG明确目标成为“AI原生”企业，与OpenAI深度合作；澳大利亚支付巨头借助ChatGPT与Codex提升效率。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：Hugging Face密集发布多项基础设施与模型部署更新，尤其“零出站存储跨云运行”与“一键部署至SageMaker”显著降低了AI应用的门槛，而OpenAI与MUFG的“AI原生”合作则标志着传统金融巨头正加速全面拥抱AI。
